theme: river god sculpting a farm delta
title: The River God's Delta
strategies: trivial: reproduce the checker's routing baseline (route spring to zone, mild stall)
greedy: route water into the zone and dig a flat catch pond so it pools
strong: engineer the derivative of the slope -- a steep entraining plunge above the zone builds a large sediment load, then a gentle traverse across the zone sheds it exactly on target
innovation_hook: Score depends on the change in transport capacity, not the flow: design the derivative of the slope -- accelerate to entrain, then stall to deposit.
